title: Anacheilium vinaceum
taxonomy: Anacheilium vinaceum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, more specifically within the monocots. Further, it belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cymbidieae. This species is part of the genus Anacheilium, which comprises various species of orchids native to the Americas. The classification of Anacheilium vinaceum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
